rawContent:
Tweet by @qu_stream (QuStream)
Author bio: World’s 1st scalable Quantum ITS. Perfect Secrecy at 0.9 cpb for Gov & Defense

Trade:  https://t.co/E3jd3mRaEk
Text: API security today relies on shared, persistent secrets:
keys, certificates, identity layers.

The flaw is structural.
API calls are just one example.

Two services shouldn’t need to store or exchange anything to verify each other.

That model is now changing. https://t.co/AJiQNnbpmO
